appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Aidan Gomez, Co-founder & CEO @Cohere: What No One Understands About Foundation Models Selection reason: 权威播客官方页面，标题与原始来源完全匹配，明确包含人物姓名、职位及访谈主题，可直接证明人物与内容的关系。 Source preview: View All Aidan Gomez, Co-founder & CEO @Cohere: What No One Understands About Foundation Models Aug 18, 2024 Posted by Aidan Gomez is the Co-founder & CEO at Cohere, the leading AI platform for enterprise, having raised over $1BN from some of the best with their last round pricing the company at a whopping $5.5BN. Prior to Cohere, Aidan co-authored the paper “Attention is All You Need,” which introduced the groundbreaking Transformer architecture. He also collaborated with a number of AI luminaries, including Geoffrey Hinton and Jeff Dean, during his time at Google Brain, where the team focused their efforts on large-scale machine learning. In Today’s Episode with Aidan Gomez We Discuss: 1.... appliedRows.title: Alexandr Wang
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: He served as CEO of Scale AI until June 2025, when Meta acquired 49% of the company... Wang left Scale to become Meta's chief AI officer. Selection reason: 福布斯个人资料页，权威媒体，详细说明其职业轨迹、财富及从Scale AI到Meta的转变。 Source preview: PROFILE Alexandr Wang $3.2B Real Time Net Worth as of 6/5/26 Reflects change since 5 pm ET of prior trading day. #1320 in the world today Photo by Ethan Pines for Forbes profile image for Alexandr Wang From the Editor Last Updated Mar 10, 2026, 1:01am EDT Alex Wang cofounded Scale AI in 2016 to help companies put their raw data to work for AI and machine learning. He served as CEO of Scale AI until June 2025, when Meta acquired 49% of the company in a deal that valued Scale at around $29 billion and Wang left Scale to become Meta's chief AI officer. Wang was the world's youngest self-made billionaire until October 2025, when he was overtaken by Polymarket founder Shayne Coplan. A New Mexico... appliedRows.title: Alexandr Wang, Chief AI Officer
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Alexandr Wang joined Meta in June 2025 as the company's first-ever Chief AI Officer, where he leads Meta Superintelligence Labs (MSL). Selection reason: Meta官方领导层页面，直接证明Alexandr Wang现任Meta首席AI官，是权威的官方来源。 Source preview: Alexandr Wang Alexandr Wang Chief AI Officer Follow on: Facebook iconThreads iconInstagram icon Alexandr Wang joined Meta in June 2025 as the company's first-ever Chief AI Officer, where he leads Meta Superintelligence Labs (MSL). As Chief AI Officer, Alexandr plays an integral role in shaping Meta's AI vision and driving its strategic initiatives from concept to execution. Prior to Meta, Alexandr founded Scale AI in 2016 as a 19-year-old MIT student with the vision of providing the critical data and infrastructure needed for complex AI projects. Under his leadership, Scale AI grew to nearly a USD 29 billion valuation and was involved in the development of most every leading model across th... appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Daniela Amodei is the President and Cofounder of Anthropic, an AI lab that puts safety at the frontier of discovery through its research and products. ... Before co-founding Anthropic, Amodei served as the Vice President of Safety and Policy at OpenAI... Selection reason: 来自知名科技媒体WIRED的官方活动页面，提供了Daniela Amodei的详细职位、背景和职业经历，权威性高。 Source preview: x Speaker Details Full Name Daniela Amodei Job Title Cofounder and President Company Anthropic Speaker Bio Daniela Amodei is the President and Cofounder of Anthropic, an AI lab that puts safety at the frontier of discovery through its research and products. As a public benefit corporation, Anthropic is dedicated to ensuring that the world can safely embrace transformative AI. Before co-founding Anthropic, Amodei served as the Vice President of Safety and Policy at OpenAI, where she led efforts to ensure the safe development and deployment of AI systems. Prior to her work in the AI industry, she was the Head of Risk Operations at Stripe, a financial technology company, where she oversaw risk... appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Demo: GNES flow API - Scalability benchmark - Summary What is GNES? hxiao87 hanxiao @hxiao Selection reason: 官方会议演示文稿，明确包含Han Xiao姓名及GNES Flow API演示，直接证明其原创贡献。 Source preview: GN Generic Neural Elastic Search S Linux Foundation OSS EU, Lyon, France. Oct. 29 LF AI Summit Han Xiao @ Agenda - What is GNES? - Breakdown: neural, elastic and search - GNES principles and tech highlights - Demo: GNES on docker swarm - Demo: GNES ﬂow API - Scalability benchmark - Summary What is GNES? hxiao87 hanxiao @hxiao GNES is Generic Neural Elastic Search 4 GNES [jee-nes] is a cloud-native semantic search system based on deep neural networks. GNES enables large-scale index and semantic search for text-to-text, image-to-image, video-to-video and any-to-any content form. Cloud-Native Semantic Search based on DNN End2End Generic Solution hxiao87 hanxiao @hxiao 5 hxiao87 hanxiao @hxiao ... MiMo rationale: 候选PDF是Han Xiao在OSS EU 2019会议上的官方演示文稿，明确包含其姓名和GNES Flow API演示内容，直接证明该项目为其原创工作，权威性高，可替换原GitHub仓库链接。 Evidence requirements: Source must name Han Xiao directly. | Source must support why "hanxiao/demo-gnes-flow" belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source.
